summary: Tested TheraVoca MVP. All 13 backend endpoints pass (12 passed + 1 intentional skip replaced by full E2E test). Backend full flow verified: create request -> verify token -> background matching notifies 72 therapists -> therapist apply (idempotent, score 72%, no email leak) -> patient results -> trigger-results -> resend-notifications -> threshold update. Admin login UI + dashboard load correctly with all stats (therapists=100, requests=1, applications=1) and request row visible.

minor.issue: Token is not exposed via any API; tests must read from MongoDB. Acceptable for security but limits black-box testability.
Returns plain dict instead of full RequestOut; field-level pydantic validation skipped for create response.

integration_issues.issue: Spec mentions redirect to /verify/pending?id=... after submit, but App.js only registers /verify/:token. If Landing redirects to /verify/pending it will hit NotFound. Needs verification by main agent (intake form is inline on Landing with back-btn/next-btn; could not exhaustively click through 6 steps in this iteration).

action_items: Verify intake form 6-step flow end-to-end on Landing page (inline) and confirm post-submit navigation target exists as a route (e.g., /verify/pending must be added or change redirect to inline confirmation).
Optionally expose verification token to admin endpoint to ease E2E testing without DB access.
Optionally tighten /api/requests response model with Pydantic.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan context.

asyncio.create_task in /requests/verify/{token} for _trigger_matching and _schedule_auto_results have no exception logging at task level (only inside _schedule). If _trigger_matching raises, task is silently dropped — should attach .add_done_callback or wrap in try/except.
AUTO_DELAY_HOURS*3600 sleep tasks survive only while uvicorn worker is alive; a restart cancels all pending 24h deliveries. Consider scheduler/cron or a periodic sweep.
rank_therapists falls back to scored[:min_results] when no therapist clears even threshold-floor; this can email very-low-score therapists. Consider hard floor (e.g., 20).
/api/admin/* uses single-header password auth without rate limiting — brute-forceable.
send_*_email logs failures but endpoint still returns success; acceptable for MVP but log aggregation for delivery failures advised.

success_rate.frontend: partial (admin login + dashboard verified; intake 6-step not fully clicked through)

seed_data_creation: Backend test created 1 request (TEST_patient@example.com) with 1 application via E2E flow; 100 therapists auto-seeded by startup hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints work. Intake form is INLINE on Landing.jsx (not a separate /intake route) using data-testid='next-btn'/'back-btn'. /verify/pending is NOT a registered route — confirm inline confirmation or add the route. Use mongo to read verification_token; backend_test.py shows the technique.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no critical bugs found. Single integration concern: redirect target /verify/pending mentioned in spec is not in App.js routes; main agent should confirm whether intake form shows inline confirmation (most likely) or actually navigates.
